Transforming Alternative Parental Care Through Knowledge, Practice And Partnership.

Sanad is a house of expertise and a trusted civil-society actor working to improve quality alternative parental care through evidence, capacity building, advocacy and practical support.

Why This Matters

Why Change Is Needed

Every child should grow up in a safe, loving and nurturing family environment. Achieving that requires stronger systems, smarter support and better practice.

Too Many Children Grow Up Without Family Care.

Children deserve safe, stable and nurturing relationships—not institutional separation.

Quality Of Care Varies Greatly.

Clear standards, capable professionals and accountability are essential for better outcomes.

Systems Need Stronger Data And Evidence.

Better learning, coordination and measurement improve decisions, programmes and services.

Families And Communities Need More Support.

Prevention, family strengthening and reintegration can reduce unnecessary separation.

How Change Happens

Our Systemic Approach

Sanad connects prevention, protection and advocacy so change is sustainable across the whole care system.

Prevention

Strengthen families and communities to prevent separation and support children to thrive.

Family Support · Early Intervention · Community Resilience

Protection

Ensure every child's right to safety, well-being and quality alternative care.

Safeguarding · Quality Standards · Oversight And Accountability

Advocacy

Influence policy and mobilise partners to build child- and family-centred systems.

Policy Reform · Awareness · Partnerships And Systems Change
